reviews.review_msg: He cares about his students and his course. The course is very well organized; he knows what he wants to talk about in advance and always plans ahead. He checks everything carefully and never surprises you with random computer glitches, equation errors, or other issues that unorganized professors often face while teaching.

Great professor! His lecture tried to cover all important aspects revoling the topic. He also gave some examples from his own experience and research into his lecturer, making it more comprehensive and understandable!
